title: vec_virus
doc: RVV (x280 512-bit vector) power-virus + per-instruction max-IPC probe,

params.name: ITERS
params.desc: inner loop trip count per class (compile-time; bigger = longer measurement window)

params.name: class
params.desc: instruction class to focus all power on (live; 'all' sweeps the table)

params.name: seed
params.desc: operand seed A (seedB=~A); dials the toggle pattern / switching activity (live)

params.name: mutate
params.desc: auto-randomize the seed every pass (xorshift) instead of holding it fixed (live)
